import React from 'react'; interface JobProps { company: string; role: string; dates: string; tag?: string; bullets: string[]; } const Job: React.FC = ({ company, role, dates, tag, bullets }) => (

{company}

{role} {tag && {tag}}
{dates}
    {bullets.map((b, i) =>
  • {b}
    • )}
); const Experience: React.FC = () => (

Work Experience

); export default Experience;
